title: Gliders
description: Fly in the sky with a new and cool Gliders!
body:
![logo](https://i.postimg.cc/xdgzc5Y6/image.png)

[![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)](https://discord.gg/tFmJ75xp86) [![patreon-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/patreon-singular_64h.png)](https://www.patreon.com/cw/canvasofsouls) [![github-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/github-plural_64h.png)](https://github.com/Coconite/Coconite-Datapacks)

# 📖 Description

This datapack/mod adds a new item called Glider. With this new item you can fly around the sky without worry about fall damage. 

Also, you can use it as a better way to counter large free falls.

You can obtain the Gliders in 8 different colors with unique designs inspired by some mobs of the game.

![colors](https://i.postimg.cc/nzKsm1vJ/image.png)

## 🛠️ Crafting

To craft a Glider, you will need:

- 3 Wools (Any color that has a glider)
- 2 Sticks
- 1 Iron Ingot

![craft](https://i.postimg.cc/DySvkg84/image.png)
